examples:
Command Example
!tn-get-saved-question-metadata question-id=130
Context Example
{
"Tanium.SavedQuestion": {
"ArchiveEnabledFlag": false,
"ExpireSeconds": 600,
"ID": 130,
name: tn-get-saved-question-metadata

outputs.description: Whether to enable archiving. Tanium.SavedQuestion.ArchiveOwner The name of the user that owns the archive. Archives can be shared between users with identical management
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedQuestion.ArchiveEnabledFlag

outputs.description: Tanium.SavedQuestion.ExpireSeconds The duration in seconds before each question expires. Default value is 600. Tanium.SavedQuestion.ID
outputs.name: rights groups.

outputs.description: The unique ID of the saved_question object. Tanium.SavedQuestion.IssueSeconds The number of seconds to reissue the question when active. Default value is 120.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: Whether the question is reissued automatically. If value is 1, the question is not reissued automatically. Tanium.SavedQuestion.KeepSeconds The number of seconds to save the data results in the archive.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedQuestion.IssueSecondsNeverFlag

outputs.description: The most recent time and date when the object was modified. Tanium.SavedQuestion.ModUserDomain The domain of the user who most recently modified this object.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedQuestion.ModTime

outputs.description: The ID of the user who most recently modified this object. Tanium.SavedQuestion.ModUserName The name of user who most recently modified this object.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedQuestion.ModUserId

outputs.description: The ID of the most recently issued question object generated by this saved_question. Tanium.SavedQuestion.Name The name of the saved_question object.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedQuestion.MostRecentQuestionId

outputs.description: The textual representation of the question. Tanium.SavedQuestion.QuestionId The ID of the question from which to create the saved question.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedQuestion.QueryText

outputs.description: Whether the row count data is saved when archiving this question. Tanium.SavedQuestion.SortColumn The column to use as the default sort column, if no sort order is specified.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedQuestion.RowCountFlag

outputs.description: The ID of the user who owns this object. Tanium.SavedQuestion.UserName The name of the user who owns this object.
outputs.name: Tanium.SavedQuestion.UserId
